brand.name: DEVOO
brand.description: We Import. Straight from the source!

hero.headline: We Import.
hero.subheadline: Premium Mediterranean olive oil and artisan products, sourced directly from family-owned farms in Southern Greece.

about.title: Straight from the Source
about.body: DEVOO partners with family-owned farms and food co-ops in Southern Greece to bring the finest Mediterranean products directly to your table. Our mission: produce local sustainable foods while using practices that promote a positive social impact — built around passion and craftsmanship.

values.title: Direct Sourcing
values.text: We work directly with family farms in Southern Greece — no middlemen.

values.title: Premium Quality
values.text: Every product is selected for freshness, taste, and nutritional value.

values.title: Sustainability
values.text: We champion sustainable farming and community-driven food production.

values.title: Lasting Relationships
values.text: We build partnerships with distributors, clubs, and catering companies.

wholesale.title: Wholesale & Private Labeling
wholesale.subtitle: Bring Greece to your brand
wholesale.body: DEVOO serves distributors, private country clubs, and catering companies with exclusive area rights, private label programs, and VIP farm tours. Let's build something together.

contact.title: Stay in Touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a distributor, restaurateur, or simply love great olive oil — we'd love to hear from you.
